query:
SELECT 
  phoneNumber,
  planName,
  serviceType,
  customerName,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost, 2) AS monthly_margin,
  marginPercent,
  status
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
  AND monthlyRevenue > 0
ORDER BY monthlyRevenue DESC;
command:
